text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is coming up soon. As the
tension builds, we celebrate the holiday season...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Happy Holidays, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, did I surprise you? I did all this while you
were out!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I didn't just decorate your room, either! There's
also a carrot cake!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to thank you for everything you do for
me. So, once again—Happy Holidays, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm glad that brought a smile to your face.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It feels like you've been really tense lately...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You helped me out so much.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's why I really wanted to do something for
you now.
choice_data_list: Thank you for doing this for me.
Thank you for doing this for me.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You don't need to thank me! This is just as much
for me as it is for you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I know we probably don't have the time to take
our foot off the gas with such a big race ahead of
us...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But I wanna cherish this special time with you!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We've got a race coming up, and it's one I can't
lose. I wanna bring everything I've got to the race
so I can win!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's why I wanna spend the day with you and—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eek! T-trainer?
choice_data_list:
Bring the feelings you have now to the race with
you too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, I will!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All righty! Let's dig into this cake! I'll slice it up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it looks super tasty! ♪
choice_data_list: Don't you go eating too much of it!
Don't you go eating too much of it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aww... I really wanna, but I understand. Not with
my big race being so soon!

We enjoy a memorable evening together. It's a
nice change of pace before heading into the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: It's kinda strange...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I've... I've never spent the holidays like this
before.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
With the Arima Kinen right around the corner, I'm
really on edge...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But... this is fun. I'm having a really good time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Today, I just wanna be the Umamusume who has
the most holiday fun in all of Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So let's do a whole lotta celebrating together,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
First, we can have some cake. And then... Oh, I've
got Santa hats that we can wear!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We'll eat chicken, and then, and then... Gah,
there's so much I wanna do!
choice_data_list: Let's do everything you can think of!
Let's do everything you can think of!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I like the sound of that!

We enjoy a memorable evening together. It's a
nice change of pace before heading into the
Arima Kinen.
